sc.political.s: FEC filings 2020-2024: NYT parent company employees donated approximately 85% to Democratic candidates/committees.
sc.dei.s: Published 2023 diversity report disclosing workforce percentages by race/gender; maintains named DEI hiring initiatives.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities documented; 2022 NewsGuild contract negotiated without major dispute.
sc.charity.s: NYT Neediest Cases Fund exists; public dollar amounts and percentage of revenue not disclosed.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; media company does not manufacture or test products on animals.
sc.guns.s: Media/publishing company; does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: 2024 API breach exposed customer email addresses; 2022 FTC settlement ($15M) over dark-pattern paid-subscription practices.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio not publicly disclosed by NYT parent company.

charity.focus: Local charity, press freedom, journalism education
